The FRED statistical tool estimates a 43% chance of an increase over a 1-week horizon, incorporating recent downward momentum and seasonal historical performance (which generally suggests mild declines or sideways movement in early September). Because it is difficult to confidently project short-term momentum six months into the future — and given the explicit instruction that uncertainty will increase and pull distant forecasts towards 0.5 — I anchor the very short-term probability at 0.43 and smoothly grade the probabilities upward toward 0.50 (a pure random walk baseline) for the more distant resolution dates.
